Question: Find two consecutive even numbers whose product is 360.
Answer: Two consecutive even number are $$-20$$ and $$-18$$ and 18 and 20.

Question: The length of a diagonal of a rectangle is three more than the width. The length of the rectangle is three times the width. Find the length of the diagonal. (Round to the nearest tenth.)

Problem Statement: For each parabola, find ⓐ which ways it opens, ⓑ the axis of symmetry, ⓒ the vertex, ⓓ the x - and y -intercepts, and ⓔ the maximum or minimum value.
Question: $$y = 3 x^{2} + 6 x + 8$$
Answer: ⓐ up ⓑ $$x = -1$$ ⓒ $$( -1 , 5 )$$ ⓓ $$y \text{:} ( 0 , 8 ) ; x \text{:} \text{none}$$ ⓔ minimum value of 5 when $$x = -1$$
